main.description: Register an activity on a report. For state-change activity types, validates the transition and updates report.status atomically.

reportId.description: ID of the report to record activity on

activity.description: The type of activity to record.

internalNote.description: Optional moderator-only note. Not visible to reporters.

publicNote.description: Optional public-facing note, potentially visible to the reporter.

isAutomated.description: Set true when this activity is triggered by an automated process. Defaults to false.

errors.name: ReportNotFound
errors.description: No report exists with the given reportId

errors.name: InvalidStateTransition
errors.description: The requested state transition is not permitted from the report's current status

errors.name: AlreadyInTargetState
errors.description: The report is already in the status implied by this activity type
